title: Remove CLAUDE_MODEL config option
body:
CLAUDE_MODEL was redundant now that PLAN_MODEL and FIX_MODEL handle per-phase model selection, and repos.json's model field serves as a catch-all fallback. Updated model resolution to three tiers instead of four.

Files changed:
- ralph/config.py: removed CLAUDE_MODEL from load_config() defaults
- ralph/claude_runner.py: removed CLAUDE_MODEL from fallback chain + docstring
- config/ralph.env.example: removed CLAUDE_MODEL line
- README.md: removed CLAUDE_MODEL from config docs and resolution order
- CLAUDE.md: removed CLAUDE_MODEL from config docs and resolution order
